generalcomments: slow cycles but very consistent. auto missed one but that was the only coral lost the entire match. stable, but driver is too lenient. they don’t push around, very passive.
overall good but had some trouble w hp (coral not falling into intake, looks easily defendable), didn’t have enough to climb bc L4 line up on last coral was off
quick and smooth movement, fast accurate intake
Got caught on algae in the last 10 seconds but was otherwise fairly efficient especially regarding coral - net was not supper controlled
ngl kinda inconsistent scoring, can not score when coral between their robot and the reef. Also their scoring from the side.. hmm their coral scoring is kind of “bouncy”
very quick climb, a bit shaky when trying to score, needs better driver awareness and communication w driver and codriver
Took some time to get aligned with the reef but otherwise were quick and fairly accurate.
attempted climb but did not lift off ground all the way, smooth movement, consistent intake
scoring is pretty consistent with a few misses, though. The robot is extremely stable when scoring L4 (not tippy). Climb is extremely fast
very similar to 5895 but slower, more inexperienced, and less stable. can also do processor. no attempted climb. 3.5 piece auto?
they keep somehow dropping the piece out of their intake after intaking, and their L4 is pretty clunky like they have to get the whole mechanism over the pole and it takes so long for them to score
had trouble intaking from human player at times, cannot do L4, smooth and medium-fast movement
Driving was a bit choppy and robot seems pretty delicate but is versatile and has good accuracy
solid driving and robot, 15s climb, nothing rly to say besides some misses, 2.5 piece auto
intake takes a while to line up, kind of bad (might also just be the HP). kept missing pieces and also took a while to score them because the alignment was weird
Did a good job helping alliance member get unstuck from algae - HOWEVER missed coral constantly, very poor accuracy
got stuck on algae and got unstuck by 102, medium-fast robot, missed intake from hp a few times
solid L4 (no shaking), good driver awareness, got coral stuck in robot at end so couldn’t climb, would’ve had 3 piece auto if hp didn’t miss
Spend lots of time aligning for climb, didn’t work. Miss a few, drive aggressive.
lowkey best robot here. very good. consistent clean cycles, driver knows to play hard, no major faults. did fail at climbing though
VERY good robot, bad communication at end but overall very good driver awareness
Driving was strange. They didn’t seem to know what they were doing/have a plan. Drove around aimlessly and had to move the elevator up and down a lot before attempting to score.
I have never seen such an avid algae scorer- that’s really all they did. Auto got slowed down by poor intake feed.
medium speed robot, slow-medium aligning speed on coral levels
sometimes has trouble keeping algae in net (flings it in), otherwise super good robot 😱
drivetrain not moving.
breakdowncomments: drivetrain seems to be unable to move. everything else on robot moves.

generalcomments: got stuck on algae, medium-fast speed robot, medium coral alignment speed, coral aligning inaccurate many times
Just kidding, 1712 is the most avid processor scorer I’ve seen. It’s literally all they can do. They have nice intake but are vulnerable to defense. They rely on their teammates immensely.

Missed the two piece auto
Was consistent, but slow scoring and driving
had trouble scoring L4 bc something broke on their robot, in the first place hp intaking has to be really precise
defensecomments: something broke in their robot so started defending at 50s, defended algae station pretty well but got a minor penalty

generalcomments: the intake has a death angle (happened in this match) their cycling / driving is ok but scoring is kinda inconsistent / not aligned (in the middle of two poles)
wobbly but solid cycles. started with 2 algae processor and then cycled coral pretty quickly. a couple missed l4.
Something happened with auto - wound up driving in slow circles. Overall nice intake and good accuracy with coral.
fast moving robot, mostly consistent hp intake,
DNP imo
defensecomments: Weak tank drive that just got pushed around. Ended up breaking down on the opponent’s side (in a useless spot).

generalcomments: mainly focused on algae, algae removing system is very bad (reef), the actual algae scoring is pretty generic
a bit slow, not too good with scoring L4, line up takes a good amount of time, needs to start climbing earlier to get points, looked like auto failed? (didn’t score L4 and just stopped)
Somewhat reliable scoring, but relatively slow. Seems very hard to feed: HP often had to try 2-3 times to feed coral.

Had to push an algae out of the way, and climbed in like 5 seconds
Overall fast and consistent cycles
Human player kept failing in auto, not bad cycling, not sure if issue was player or intake though.
Very solid coral cycled and has ability to remove algae, faster climb seems reliable
suspicious driver actions, very passive and alignment takes a while
Pretty fast cycles, and solid 3 piece auto.

pretty smooth cycles, doesn't seem like it's designed to be an L1 bot but it does them pretty well. Don't think they'll fall to us, but they're well-driven and have good consistent scoring. They also don't take too long at HP.
Okay scorer. Might have auto-align. Biggest issue is holding the coral; had many issues with not indexing/handing off properly or getting knocked out when scoring.
defensecomments: Would play defense when a piece wasn’t indexed properly, did okay job of blocking HP stations but was trying to score half the time and defend the other half??

generalcomments: Really likes algae, not very good with coral from what I see as it would only go for l1 and missed most. An algaebot
Heavily defended had a lot of trouble at hp intakes, cycle time nearly doubled
Honestly good driving, pretty fast cycles. Very good at L2
Below average coral accuracy. Feeding/driving both OK though
Went straight to defense after a wierd auton
defensecomments: Went straight to defense, somewhat erratic but has the spirit, caused a penalty, did an alright job though in pinning

generalcomments: Started their climb with 30 seconds left in match, got it within 10. both HP messed up a lot and missed a lot, which made it hard. they were also being defended fairly well. They have pretty good driving but miss a lot of L4s and aren't great with defense
Consistent barge cycles
nice alignment (climbing and scoring) sometimes their decisions are a little questionable but I think they are the definition of medium speed and steady (may) win the race
Very fast, accurate scorer. That’s all they did the whole time. Very quick climb too, maybe <10 seconds!
Did pretty well with algae, pretty good with coral though slightly slower, interesting climb, not bad
Took a long time to feed and line up.
Poor positioning in auton intake popped an algae with intake and it got stuck
Very quick algae removal bot, all level intake and both processor and barge scoring. Otherwise fast coral cycling from levels 1-4, though underended
Bad coral (takes absolutely forever to align/ wait for wobbly end effector to stop wobbling), mediocre algae
Very fast reef scoring due to coral ground intake. Reliable net scoring as well. However, extremely tippy (probably driver’s fault)
Pretty bad initially, began cycling properly after some misses.
kit bit, questionable tanky driving
Very fast coral cycling robot that can remove algae but no clear intake for them, undefended
Reliable scoring, but elevator wobbly when extended. Could be a driver issue
impressive, intentional driving. good consistent cycles. 7-10sec climb. smooth driving. few errors-got hit in auto but corrected themselves.
Inconsistent L4, but decent driving. Somehow intake a piece sideways while being defended.
Fast climb, deep cage. Cycles are fast but unreliable so we’ll see how it does, it missed quite a few. Climb is a large plus
Sold 2-4 iffy l1
Very smooth driving and scoring. Misses sometimes
did processor for the other team..? for coop hmmm interesting, algar mechanism is kinda did especially when defense, corals falls out of intake when driving too fast
Slow but consistent cycles. Slow driving and align, spun around looking lost while trying to align.
Tried to score in opposing processor curiously, not too fast cycling.
seemed confused abt their mechanisms, didn’t really know how to work their systems and ended up playing defense (possible js having problems w controls?)
defensecomments: tried to block opponents from hp and processor - didn’t really work and moved around too mcuh

generalcomments:
Slow cycles (~11-13 seconds) because of feeding and scoring align issues, sometimes drops the coral after being fed into intake. 
Decently fast deep climb (~7 seconds)
decent algae robot, cannot score reef well as likely no auto align
algae only bot. average driving. Why are we scouting them?
fast cycles, driving was smooth, alignment a bit slow
they figured out the scoring by later on, pretty good honestly it’s what i would want out of a third bot if possible. misses were in the beginning
coral kept falling out of their end effector before scoring. Decent driving

Scoring seemed to have quite some issues throughout the match because they had a piece of coral but kept driving around without scoring anything. 
Failed a couple of corals because they couldn’t align.
almost failed to climb at the end due to a lot of algae clutter, otherwise strong cycles
laggy in auto and genuinely don’t know what they were doing all match? js lagging and twitching around after scoring 2 l4
Stole algae all game, scored all of their own algae— most efficient algae robot
decent cycling, knocking off algae is hard but doable, takes some time to align to reef
would have been a 2.5 piece auto but they got beached in auto. feed from HP is finicky. driving is passable but the robot is slow. Climbed at ~25 secs left, completed it at ~10s.

Had a lot of problems while aligning to score L4. Their scoring mechanism would move from side to side while trying to align to the pole and failed some of the time. Had the same problem in both Teleop and auto.
consistent coral scoring, cycles are a bit slow but not bad at all, driving was smooth

breakdowncomments: Enabled but didn’t move all match

generalcomments: sometimes has trouble intaking from hp, otherwise decent cycling and driving although seems defendable by waiting at a HP station
driving was pretty bad. Robot jerked around and had some CoG issues as well. Backup bot level imo
Decent scoring although it takes them a while to align to the pole on the reef. Tried to score algae but failed once after it bounced out. Knocks algae off reef while scoring coral.
climbed at ~10. Good driving
good cycling + nice auto (even more if the first one hits) good driving too, 7045 was defending them / pushing them but they weren’t budging yay

crazy lowk - cycles super fast alignment super efficient, intake pass off is so good (each sort of intake type is nicely connected), good driving and maneuvering 
climb was pretty fast
shaky and confused driving, unconfident? played def after not being able to score
defensecomments: decent defense, able to push others away from HP stations and hit other bots hard

generalcomments: Very shaky robot, takes a long time to load and align to score because their elevator keeps wobbling. Decent deep climb but went to barge zone at around 20 seconds.
decent driving with some missed HP feeds, auto is off in positioning with slow alignment
played algae only. had some trouble picking up and scoring algae. ok driving ig
medium speed cycles, smooth driving but cycles had to be slowed as coral kept coming out off reef

Good driving and scoring for L4 and L3, missed feed in auto and only scored one L4. 
Good climb at the end.
alignment is off, driver also seems slightly new? HP missed 2nd piece
fast climb and pretty fast cycles, consistent scoring but could align faster
Very good, cycling is very efficient mostly bc they can eject coral while in possession of an algae
crashed into 1807 in auto, miscommunication maybe? Ok driving, elevator looked like it had some mechanical problems at the end
Good scoring in L4 but misses occasionally due to the height of the elevator being off. Also good algae net scoring and removing algae from the reef.
has trouble getting algae off reef when scoring, good driving but tends to go to an hp station that already has a robot instead of an open one
Lots of cycles but also lots of misses in that. They have an L1 but they often accidentally run it the wrong way and it misses. Very fast robot and speedy elevator.
cycles are pretty fast, consistent at coral placement
speedy climb, scored 2 own processor and 2 in opponent, algae focused robot
No alignment so very inconsistent scoring, deep climbing tries and seems to align very quickly but doesn’t work (same as previous match they played)
ok driving, missed a feed in auto. would have claimed if they had literally 1 second more

Drove in a straight line but did not score L4 coral in auto. 
Slow cycles during teleop because they have to manually align to each pole. Failed L2 scores because they were too high up.
pretty good cycling though inaccurate on the lower levels
okay driving although is easily pushed around and defended
just a very solid reef scoring robot
1 piece lv1 auto. Goes to play defense but is very unstable. When it drives the sides goes up, therefore the robot has slightly mounted on top of 484 sometimes. Defends in front of hp station.
defensecomments: Defends in front of hp station.

generalcomments: Good coral scorer, good driving, can do L1! Quick cycling and reliable accuracy, good scoring bot
robot seems a little shaky and takes time aligning but overall is pretty consistent w coral + can score algae in every way

Can remove algae but doesn’t seem to score it; janky coral scoring (HP intake failed multiple times—dont know whether it was bc of a bad human player or the mechanism) + manual align. Quick climb but it fell down really quickly as well
Very solid coral cycles though ubdefended 3 piece failed missed two
Got a coral stuck in their robot in the first 20 seconds (their first cycle) went to go play defense.
defensecomments: Did a good job of sitting in front of HP station and not getting pushed around

generalcomments: does not drive close enough to the reef when scoring and as a result fails a lot, bumper is prone to lifting up and got beached on teammates and algae
Very slow driving, but good, consistent algae cycles.

Pretty mid coral scoring. They have a janky coral manipulator that also intakes from the HP station, it’s quite small and hard to feed into, the coral is not held stably and can fall out, they need to manual align.
driving is very slow, L4 scoring was decent, kept pushing L3 coral against algae (looked like they were trying to remove algae with the coral???)

They do have a coral manipulator but they didnt use it at all, besides missing an L3 in auto. Otherwise, they literally did barge the entire time. Pretty good and efficient at it. Their climb lists a lot.
Scoring a was bit inconsistent, but driving was good.
coral scoring is good (alignment takes a little bit of time), loses control of algae easily when robot shakes or knocks into things
Algae removal, not sure if they can intake it but solid coral cycles
pretty good “cleanup bot” vibes, good cycling and alignment
hp intake can be a bit inconsistent, otherwise coral scoring is pretty good

Was delayed by 8 seconds in auto. Better cycles for various levels of coral than what I would have expected. They were the leading force for this alliance and put up pretty good numbers-alliance has 184 points.
Inconsistent L4, seemed like their end effector couldn’t decide which L4 pole to drop the coral onto. Otherwise decent
Algae processor bot. Their mechanism is quite janky. Tried to score an algae in the processor in auto but didn’t get it completely in—finished the job in teleop.
Terrible at l1 unreliable processor score
overall good coral scoring, algae mechanism is pretty good + can score in processor AND net but can also drop algae sometimes
robot started being rly slow in the last 5 seconds (idk they were still cycling though) good scoring though sometimes questionable spatial / team awareness
Started tweaking when trying to remove the last algae in the reef, but otherwise good driving and    fast cycles.
Stopped working…
breakdowncomments: They glitched throughout auto and then the robot basically gave up during tele. They could still move and climb but couldn’t do anything else.
defensecomments: Went to play defense because they couldn’t really do anything else, defense wasn’t very effective

generalcomments: Not a good auto. Intakes from hp station and removes algae to score into the processor. Decent cycles for lv4 coral, though human player could do a better job of feeding. Seems to be a common theme for these teams that rely on the feed as most do.
L1 bot, low accuracy. Ran into some issues with blue alliance defense
10157 playing decently good defense on them at HP—not sure if 316 can just get pushed easily. their barge shot feels a bit low
really fast and consistent coral and algae scoring, ground coral intake makes it really fast and efficient
soloed the coop, slow driving but good algae actions
7045 played defense on them in the hp station. Again, pinned them against the station.
great cycling, very efficient. not sure why they missed so many, seemed a bit confused at times. the other human player messed up the flow a bit because they WALKED over to the station after auto.
Decent cycles, but was pretty easily defended.
played defense for full match
defensecomments: knocked down the lollipops, quite good at pinning robots at hp station, never got pinning penalties and was pretty effective in keeping opponents from intaking coral

generalcomments: a very solid coral scoring robot :)
Failed auto. Is able to fill up various levels of the reef quite nicely. Works as the driving force of the alliance to score, though the match is tight.
Pretty mid coral scoring bot, nothing much else to say
Failed climb at last second
how is it possible to miss this much…
Inconsistent algae pickup and scores

Consistent L4 cycles, but slow and inaccurate algae cycles. Had trouble intaking algae as well
Mediocre driving

jig auto start on far side blue, 3.5 coral auto
even with traffic and having a coral stuck for like 10 seconds, they scored very well in teleop

Couldn't really intake coral from HP that well, coral kept falling out at least 50% of the time. Weird ways to outtake as well, in total it took about one fail before they got a success. Algae outtake kept throwing the algae in, but it kept bouncing out.

The bot is pretty fast and they have good driving skills, but their align was consistently off by a little to the left, sometimes luckily scoring. They seem like an okay processor bot, though. Was pretty fast at scoring in it.
Inconsistent L4, and just above average driving.

Overall, the bot is very smooth. The auto is very clean, a 3 piece. They have a decent speed and have good driving skills. They also rarely rock over. They can score L2, L3, and L4, although they primarily did L2 and L3 in this game.

Wobbly end effector, and inconsistent L4
Average algae
Mediocre driving
Auto weird... scored and left, but came back so they didn't "leave". Also, took a lot of time trying to decide where to score coral. Overall solid, but a bit clumsy.
A solid bot. They never missed once; although they admittedly didn’t do as much as their teammates. There was a lot of shaking and rocking.

auto start processor side red. Did not get auto bc HP intake didnt work, which was a common theme (it gets stuck a lot). missed a couple L4, dont know why. pretty good driving tho with purpose. couldnt climb bc algae in way
very effective cycling and the scoring is quite accurate. driving is good as well, intentional and they know where they are going
Slightly worse sycamore 5614 basically, somehow hits a great 3p auto. Got stuck on algae twice but got off fast, popped one algae in the process. Besides traffic scores well
Their main problem is that their arm is SUPER shaky, making it hard to score anything. Whenever they try to score L3 or L4, they have to spend a while aligning perfectly.
Center auto and consistent cycles. Seemed to have trouble intaking. Fast deep climb
Had a weird HP intake, I think it broke. They sometimes failed intaking a lot. Driving good.
breakdowncomments: HP intake and coral outtake broke first half of match

generalcomments: a lot of their time gets spent at the coral station. scoring is a but finicky for some reason

Center auto, inconsistent L4
Fast driving, but a bit reckless
A pretty solid bot. Cycled pretty good. The seems to have a similar capability to ours. Fast and good driving. Nothing really negative to say about it.
auto is far side blue start. Beautiful driving, great. elevator is fast. just was scoring bc no defense on them. had a little trouble w L3 tho. ability to deep climb, but there wasnt enough time
A bit clumsy. One time ejected L1 coral a meter from the reef. Another time they went to processor without an algae. Fast, but takes a bit of time at HP intake as they keep squirming around there.
went to climb in the last 25 seconds, good scoring + driving + spatial awareness
HP is selling, why erent they feeding. painfully mid—pretty slow scoring

HP intake keeps failing them, one time failed during auto, and they tried to score w/o a coral. Intake needs to be perfect  for it to work. Maybe if they spent less time on lights and decor their hp intake would be better and they would score more points.
Honestly really fast teleop coral cycles, consistent too. Good driving and alignment

A very good algae bot. Their algae auto is consistent and seems good, they covered the algae with their teammates cycled coral. Got a lot of algae in the net and got a coopertition point by scoring in the other team’s processor.
wobbly end effector but great robot w good driving. is able to make up tor HP mistakes and still intakes it well. couldn't climb within 7 ish seconds.
Very fast coral cycles, but algae is slower and more inconsistent. Good deep climb.

Scored an L4 and then knocked it out??? Outtake weird for that level... but they scored a decent number of L3. They can take out algae on the reef, but can only intake algae from ground. Their auto looked kinda broken? Scored L4, then wiggled in one spot.
A really good bot. Cycled really well. The bot is pretty fast and has good driving. They scored a really good amount of coral.

auto is far side blue. every time they drive a long distance while carrying and then stop abruptly in front of the barge it falls out and they have to pick it up again. this happened like 3 times. they are really good tho. Missed one in auto bc HP.
Definitely algae focused team, although it seems they have a hp intake. Risk of algae intake popping algae though, happened during match. Overall fast and scores frequently.

Had trouble intaking from HP station
Otherwise fine, good deep climb
Very very efficient, didn’t stop moving once. They’re super accurate too. Not one missed feed.
auto is processor side blue. They crashed into a teammate which made them pop algae. other than that, great driving and good, fast cycles. couldnt climb at end with last 6-8 seconds.

An okay bot. They primarily cycled L3 and just removed algae. Their problem with removing algae was that whenever they removed one, if there was any coral directly above or directly below it, it fell off.
Were also quite efficient and can score in a variety of ways. Were vulnerable to defense though.
something wrong with their intake, should’ve just done defense instead of L1 which they miss (already 2 other offense robots and defense robot from other team)
medium speed robot, missed hp intake 3 times at the start of match
robot motionless throughout the majority of the match, did nothing meaningful
bumped into other cages (penalty), otherwise good driving and fast cycles, 30s climb
Very quick, wasted no time getting aligned, great intake accuracy and diverse range of scoring capabilities
waiting in line at HP??? just go to the other one?? 5 second climb but they headed over pretty early on
Intake is broken/malfunctioning. The coral in between the elevator rails and ends up in the belly pan. Managed to score l1 by rotating intake plate.
had trouble with scoring first algae into reef, medium speed robot, movement was a little stuttery
Took a minute to figure out what they were gonna do. Experimented at first but resorted to coral when all else failed.
15s climb, very good and solid cycles (missed are from other robots bumping), very good driver awareness, 2.5 piece auto
shaky when elevator is extended, medium-fast speed
consistent and solid cycles. not slow, makes careful maneuvers, avoids collisions. did their job.
solid, could work on alignment but pretty fast cycles, didn’t climb soon enough
tippy but consistent and does their job. no other comment.
Seemed very rushed and definitely would have benefited from slowing down and moving more efficiently. Poor aim, low(ish) accuracy.
5s climb, elevator is a bit slow so is tippy when putting up algae in net, mostly algae robot it seems
fast moving robot, missed hp intake or had coral fall out of robot a few times, robot looked smooth and cycled decently
consistent cycles. slow extension of elevator. driver seems inexperienced.
fast moving robot, scoring coral was mostly smooth and fast
Removed algae well, they probably could have benefited from scoring it in the processor or net. Scoring is relatively accurate but intake is iffy
something wrong with their end effector, went to defend, still very shaky elevator and slow scoring whether it’s algae or coral
defensecomments: started w 40s left, stayed at one hp station most of time (but could stay there more), not super effective but at least followed the basics

generalcomments: Very good at algae but very bad aim and intake for coral
consistent, good, until 1 min. then driver and hp started making mistakes: coral missing from intake, not lining up with reef, overextension.
wouldn’t pick bc too many misses, better kit bots out there, driver awareness bad didn’t even park or see that coral feel out of robot
medium speed robot, missed L4 multiple times, climbed with 30 sec left in match and had to reclimb
lining up seems odd…. also cannot match height. seems operator controlled. loose intake
medium-fast speed, was a little tippy when stopping, elevator was slow-medium speed and aligning coral was the same
Very clean dual intake for algae but poor aim especially with the net.
Very smooth driving and scoring. HP missed several pieces at one point idk what was happening there. Fire fire. Good driving
slow, in the beginning missed a bit but otherwise decent, decent driver awareness
ground intake works pretty well but their entire mechanism is complex and they missed a decent amount of L4. climb is fast and the scoring is good when it works, especially for non-L4
L1 only no climb kit bot midline l1 auto missed
their robot is beautiful and amazing, ground intake allows for super fast cycles and they’re quite consistent. 😍😍 i love daisy. driving is good too—intentional

Super jerky, handoff takes a lot of space in front (so can’t be at the reef while handing off) and a long time. Scoring unreliable. Also hard to feed, even by their own HP. Driving might be ok, but limited by design
Decently quick cycles, missed a few but seems to be within acceptable bounds. Did quite a bit of algae, decently fast
Algae only robot that just isn’t that good at algae or driving. Only ground intake alagae and processor
defensecomments: Just strafed back and forth around the source, did a good job of making sure not to get holding penalties or hitting robots at reef

generalcomments: insanely fast climb. they aren’t bad, scoring is kind of good but mainly doing L3. their processor is mid, they missed a few and spent time chasing after the algae
ok cycling and driving, takes a bit to align, popped an algae, unbeached themselves
Scoring ok if slow but REALLY HARD TO FEED, coral has to be vertical for it to be able to score. Pieces will often fall out also. Driver is good but limited by design flaws.
Couldn’t get off ground in time, end effector is a bit of a shooter, looks cool but the coral occasionally bounces off and falls off.

Very successful defender played by 1391, repeated ramming to push 2539 975 of position 

Their scoring is just inconsistent, missed nearly half of theirncycles
10157 playing pretty good defense on them at HP; scoring a decent amount of coral and it’s pretty consistent; almost fell over w elevate extended
Went to opposing side quickly, missed in auto maybe they were poorly tuned or something
defensecomments: Messed up krypton intaking twice, decent defense style.

generalcomments: Scoring average (slow + a bit hard to feed) but driver is pretty smooth
Fast coral cycler 2.5 piece autp
Crazy scorer, super fast. Even when algae got stuck was able to dislodge it easily. Driver is fast and responsive. Weak point is auto, probably glitched this round
Pretty fast cycles, intake is pretty mediocre, not very reliable, doesn’t have the highest level of precision in most fields
Got coral stuck in bot started playing defense
defensecomments: Clear they didn’t play defense beforehand it was on a whole otherwise did average job of staying in front of the source

generalcomments: Reliable algae scoring but coral scoring way worse. Main issue is the pieces keep falling out when they try to score, and seems like no align to the reef. Driving should be okay still

Very good algae cycles. Their coral was broken I think because they tried to do it but then gave up. Last match they had some issue with it so it makes sense. Very nice net to climb cycle in like 5 second at the end of the match
Interesting deep cage mechanism and end effector seems to work well enough. Not much else to say, medium speed.
their auto path kind of just wanders? got a coral stuck in themselves during auto now they're disoriented. spent actually 45 seconds trying to get the piece out.
Algae removal only not intake
Fast and reliable scorer, driving solid as well
Very jerky, much power in end effector shoots it a little hard. The jerkiness can make precision hard in some cases like climb.
Stole algae from opponent reef. Really nice net scoring. Nice little climb. Honestly better algae robots out there cuz they’re lowk slow and miss sometimes.
Coral cycler though undefended had very reliable cycles and minimal misses
Liked the processor, did it a bit, very fast elevator, but doesn’t do coral.
defensecomments: Beached while defending, so it ended pretty quickly. I kind of feel bad it looks like it’s dying trying to shake off the algae 😔

generalcomments: Good driving, this time had some issues with scoring but I couldn’t tell what was wrong. Auto I think also had an issue

Below average coral only bot, coral repeatedly fell out of scoring mechanism and took very long to align at times — even then they often mised

Though their intake seems less easily defended then others
Really nice algae cycles but can easily be defended since they need to flick it up. Coral is alright as well. Coral cycle driving isn’t that good.
Still solid scorer/driver but with more misses than average. Their climb was interrupted by another robot swinging their cage.
auto starts middle blue.They spent first 5 seconds trying to get a low algae off reef (failure), then went to play defense.
defensecomments: literally beached itself 5 seconds in. genuinely nothing more to say. when they were playinf defense they were kinda aggressive but not bad, just overcommitted and then beached and then fell over.

generalcomments: Decent cycling, weak auton from center, a robot capsized at the loading station kinda crazy, robot is alright
Ran onto an algae, panicked a bit. Good driving and quick score. Drops algae easily, need better judgement in scoring location and paths. Consistent intake.
kept trying to place on the poles they already filled, just a simple leave auto
fast cycles, specialized in l1 l2, climb was fast and efficient
Fast scoring, although it takes them longer to align during l4 scoring. Almost tipped themselves over while chasing after an algae near the cages. Good net scoring at well.
fast and strong cycling, some slow confused movement at start but got better
hard to see but elevator was shaky, driving was ok but not fast, alignment took a little long and slow. net algae is just throwing the algae up, rarely successful
team got way too excited when they scored an L1…the way they do it is a bit sketch. climb is fast, robot is pretty good overall incl driving and scoring higher levels. barge shot isn’t good

Very fast cycles, using both coral stations. Scores on all 4 levels and doesn’t take a very long time to align. 
Popped an algae when they got stuck on it while cycling.

defensecomments: attempted to block hp and did slow down some intakes but was not efficient overall, moved aside to let other team intake, did not do much

generalcomments: tried to palce on something that was already there once, tries to align with elevator fully up so shaky
HP is kind of mid, missed a few pieces. Their scoring is good, would be a valuable 3rd bot. getting defended by 10157
driving is ok, feed is finicky and only works pressed up against the station. I don't think they would be good against defense

Good coral scoring on L4 and L3. Got defended against at the coral station and slowed down cycle time significantly because they couldn’t get a coral into the intake. Struggled to pick a low algae off the reef but eventually got it.
they drop coral so easily (falling offend effector). climb is around 10 seconds and took some time to align
fast cycles, consistent scoring, driving was smooth
algae only bot... ok driving, doesn't look like they'd be good on defense
decent cycling although sometimes bad pathing, cannot align well if coral in front of reef sometimes
Decent scoring and cycles and good 3 piece auto. More elaborate comment about breaking down below.
breakdowncomments: Couldn’t eject coral for the last 30 seconds of the match and kept shifting between levels.

generalcomments: fast fast cycles, two intakes make it super efficient and does not have to use hp a lot of the times, smooth and fast driving, good maneuvering
strong algae bot, okay coral with a decent amount of misses
Good L2 and L3 scoring but failed L4 a couple of times because their elevator was at a wrong height. Got defended against by 1712 (pushed away from coral station)
strong match for them with good cycling, auto paused after 1 pc without registering the next? non-team hp feeds are worse

significantly faster at lower levels and had some alignment issues at l4 
driving was smooth

Good coral scoring although it takes them time to align for L4. 
Failed to keep the algae in their mechanism after removing it from the reef a few times.
Failed to deep climb at the end.
decent driving and scoring, idk if they can deal w algae tho
good algae and coral scoring, coral ground intake (for L1) can be slow though and isnt as accurate
Love from 5895 to 5895

Pretty slow but ok coral scoring, not much else to say. Driving was kind of meandering at the beginning of the match. After scoring 1 L4 in auto they aligned w the processor but didn’t score it, and then didn’t do algae for the rest of the match
Pretty good coral and algae scorer. End effectors for algae and coral are both super wobbly though
robot isnt very fast, hp intake doesnt always land in the right way and wastes time trying to fix that, reef scoring isnt always accurate
Decent cycles for both algae and coral; however they were not the fastest. Able to remove algae and score it into the processor while also scoring coral. Able to deep climb for the endgame.
Smooth driving, really fast cycles. Hp panicked but else can get 1-2 more cycles. Really good decisions made when scoring. Can’t intake
they’re okay honestly not much crazy. they got beached for a bit but 75 fixed them (not all that well but they got off the algae eventually)
Couldn’t hit the third piece for some reason in auto. Driving very smth and completes most of lv4 for alliance. Couldn’t climb but parked.
Looked like they were about to park but ran out of time it seems like. Theyre okay at scoring. Particularly their HP intake is kind of inconsistent
I really like this robot overall. Only cons are that intaking misses sometimes and that when they align they sometimes go up to a scoring stage which is alr filled
Has trouble with algae. Elevator slow, alignment takes long time so slow cycles. But drive is smooth and smart, intake quick. Underwhelming, didn’t get time to park.
at the beginning they kept missing reef shots (looked like they were manual alining) but later on L3 scoring was very clean

This auto includes removing an algae. Has some difficulty driving around algae sometimes. Backs up a lot in order to align but coral scoring is very accurate. Does not attempt to score lv4 but good job focusing on lower levels. No attempt to climb or park
Pretty good scorer. It looks like their algae mech was having some problems at the end so they switched to coral. Other than that, the entire match was algae.
reef scoring is good but a tiny bit inaccurate, robot is kind of shaky when elevator is lifted, barge scoring doesnt seem to be very accurate
Can’t do algae. Quick climb <5s. Score fast cycles, but scoring mech shaky when intake and scoring. Had alignment issue with missing coral, not on same reef. Consistent drive & fast swerve

Running a 2 piece auto lv4 coral (9015). Teleop. Seems to function as the second robot to 9014, working to fill up the lv4 reef. Then, intakes from hp station and works on lv3. Starts to climb with 12 seconds left to go. Successfully deep climbs.
Coral fell out during auto
defensecomments: They caused the blue alliance a fair amount of trouble but weren’t super stellar. Just pretty good defense

generalcomments: Don’t do algae, tried to go for to so didn’t climb/park. Very fast scoring, l3 is bit low, has some trouble aligning that. Quick intake, deal with defense well, makes smart decisions to score.
very quick paced cycles (tiny bit slower than us but similar), very consistent w everything in general
Coral scoring bot, they’re okay at it, pretty quick but they miss a little often

Ran left 3 piece auto but didn’t have time for the third piece. Often misses lv4 coral but does lv3 and lv2 coral well. Attempts to deep climb at the end and got their climber in the cage but they cannot pull themselves up at the end so it counts for park
really solid and consistent algae scorer (coral is not bad)
honestly better than i thought they’d be, kind of solid scoring with few misses, driving is fine but nothing notable

Hp intake is good, just player is bad and needs better feed. Spent too much time on processor for rp , not efficient. Very fast cycles, smooth elevator and coral score. Need better strategy. Wanted to score but pressed wrong  in the end so didn’t climb

Running a right side 2 piece auto but missed because of human player. Can intake algae ground and scoreAttempted to score barge but didn’t work the first time; worked the second/third time. With 35 seconds speeds other to the other side to grab more algae
Really fast deep climb + mid algae and coral scoring
a very good algae bot and pretty decent reef scorer, driving is just pretty slow
Too long time to align for deep climb. Super fast cycles, astonishing scoring speed. Ground intake very effective, toss into barge is elegant.
Good balance between algae and coral, but struggled a bit with defense.
pretty good driving. drive with purpose and are smooth. could be a valuable defense bot, bc they cant score L4 as accurately and quickly as us but look great driving wise.
Really quick, can only do coral (really good at it) and remove (not pick up) algae. Got stuck on algae when trying to park last 6 seconds unfortunately. Solid.

Failed climb
Auto: HP took way too long to feed, probably could have hit a 3 piece
Decently fast and consistent coral cycles

auto starts middle blue. their driving is honestly not the best; spent so long trying to clear one algae out of way of reef. theyre  slightly tippy and drive in a slight jerky fashion, but are still not bad whatsoever. honestly not sure if climbed bc alga

The bot’s arm insanely shaky. This causes for the auto to be inconsistent and also causes it to take a long time to score a coral; they have to align it just right and wait for it to stop rocking a little.
quick climb, cycles are pretty good but they missed a lot towards the beginning—they have the speed and potential
auto starts red middle. their elevator is pretty slow, and they take a while for their cycles because of this and that they drive slow
Some of the driving was a bit reckless, and cause cycles to be slower than usual, as well as a couple misses
An okay bot. Moves fast, has decent driving, and cycles coral pretty well. However, their arm doesn’t seem like it has the best outtake design, as it seems a little annoying to get it ti score.
pretty good algae and coral cycles, solid robot overall, plspls be left for us..
Very inaccurate L4, but fast and consistent L3 and L2 cycles. Pretty well driven, and knocked algae off very quickly.
Fast, but a bit clumsy. Coral fell out way before reef at least 3 times. Fast though.
Due to their intake design, the coral can end up in many different places in the intake, making it really hard to align and score the coral. Although it is possible, it takes a lot of time to do.

auto started middle blue. delayed auto so others could hit 3 piece and they hit 1 piece. they drive kinda aggressively and shakily. their climb is quick tho, just didnt have enough time. pretty good overall tho, but i think not good enough for defense
HP miss in auto. climb pretty fast, main focus on algae during this match, don’t hate it but kind of mid
Had defense played against them. Played well against them but overall not playing that great. Started working from L2 and went up.
Quick at coral, until the last minute where they kept just trying to get the same L4 spot and failing, until they got it, and went to deep climb, but suddenly dropped at failed.

Driving is a bit slow, but cycles are pretty consistent
HP messed up feeds for auto
A solid bot. It is pretty fast, has good driving, and cycles pretty well. It doesn’t have good L1 or algae capabilities, but other than that, pretty good.
auto starts red middle. first 20 seconds just tryna score a bit then went over yo play defense.
defensecomments: stole some algae from ground and tried to score which was good, but werent very accurate. they also couldnt really stop krypton from foing anything which sucks.

generalcomments:
Consistent algae barge cycles
Driving seemed fine
auto starts far side blue with jig. their elevator is lowkey kinda slow and they drive slow too. their climb is like 5 secs which is kinda good.
The bot is okay. It has L4, L3, and L2 capabilities, and it seems pretty good at it. It was a helpful team member until it broke down.
breakdowncomments: When it broke down, it froze directly next to the reef, rendering a section of it completely useless. They stayed there until the end of the match.

generalcomments: Very clumsy... Failed to evade defense and just had trouble intaking in general- design flaw. Probably wasted a minute because of these issues alone.
Honestly played really well, good driving, good pathing, consistent cycles.

They have a great bot, but theyre honestly just too slow. they drive slower than most and they have a kind of scanning process to score the coral which sometimes takes a while. they also had like 12 seconds to deep climb w nothing inhibiting and didnt hit

strat of pushing all pieces to one HP and defending the other—seems to be effective in slowing the other alliance but they aren’t really doing much as the other teams are just maneuvering around them or not going to that HP
Nearly hit the four piece auto, and coral cycles were pretty fast. Overall well driven and consistent.
Really solid robot, focused on coral and executed beautifully. No other comments.
They have good driving, but the bot itself is a little slow. Wasn’t able to do much on the match compared to their teammates.
they have a great bot, but their coding sometimes fails them in the form of alignment issues. they also have pretty great driving. also are pretty creative in how they can do L1
they are just sitting at the reef/broke
Alignment took a longgggg time. They stopped driving for a good 30 seconds in the middle of the match. Likely a malfunction

? i mean… i guess they did their job but they also confuse me. for some reason, they hit the cage when parking but came back to hit it again… maybe driver overshot? otherwise pretty solid. can remove algae even with coral in between bumpers and wall.
defender was in the way so cycling got slower, overall decent driving and driver awareness
medium-fast speed robot, hp intake and scoring of coral were mostly smooth
good cycles. missed a couple times due to misalignment but recovered quickly.
solid robot with good driver, fast cycles, auto for reason failed tho
cycles were very very good quality, auto was a little bit shaky but they made up for it with coral in teleop. Can score every level. Will score every level.
medium robot speed, missed intake once otherwise consistent
consistent cycles. nothing special. sometimes end eff doesn’t release but doesn’t seem to happen too many times:
Quick cycles and skilled driving, drop the coral sometimes
medium-fast speed robot, had trouble aligning scoring mechanism to coral columns at times, had difficulty scoring L4 as well as other layers
needs to work on driver awareness but super quick climb (2-3s), algae needs some work was well looks like they fill L3 better than L4
Quick cycles, does algae really well. Didn’t do any coral. Would be a compatible 3rd bot
a little wobbly and slightly affects accuracy.
medium-u speed robot, cycled well, had a fast climb
Very algae oriented, nice algae cycles - didn’t hesitate to steal coral from other alliance
quick climb (<5s), good and fast driving but codriver might be pressing some wrong levels (still good tho), knocks off algae but not sure if actually scores
Nice cycles but it didn’t seem like they had a plan at first. Were kind of driving around figuring it out at first.
had difficulty onL4s  on the side closest to driver, medium speed robot, decently fast climb
i rly like this robot, smooth driving and solid cycles, just needs some work on algae scoring (would make a good robot for L2 and L3
great fast intentional cycles, they didn’t focus on much algae this time though
Decent cycles but accuracy is pretty low, can score in multiple ways, better with algae
medium-fast speed robot
Fast cycles, just run it back and forth. They know what works for them.
good robot but driver needs some work, codriver is actuating elevator too early causing the line up to be bad and then they miss the reef, also in general driving is decent but not the best
medium-fast moving robot, has a shooting mechanism for net algae which was innacurate, scoring mechanism was mostly accurate
Very good coral cycler with minimal missing, able to remove algae at every level and almost 4 piecs
I didn’t catch auto too well do not take my word for it. Interesting climber, quite functional, not very fast cycles.
Seemed to have a problem with scoring coral/intaking algae (same mechanism I think): had to try many times and wasn’t as fast/accurate as before
Nice cycles, no algae, very efficient intake and score. Has issue with height of scoring mech so kept missing l2. Quick climb.

This driver can’t seem to decide what level they’re scoring at, slow cycles and slow Algae removal 

They miss half of their attempts, im genuinely unsure what they are even trying to do when they’re at the reef as they move the elevator while ejecting
Froze at the station I think it lost coms. Decent until it happened.
breakdowncomments: Lost coms early at player station, remained so for the rest of the game.

generalcomments: All 6 RP!
Good scorer and didn’t get in the way too often. Also scored 2 algae in other processor (I assume for coopertition) which I didn’t count here
Needs to 180 to score between source and reef, defendable
Scoring itself was fine but other robots kept getting in the way of their scoring/feeding, general bad coordination w/ others
really smooth cycles and the L1 was pretty good too.
Very slow scoring. Good consistency, but only doing lower levels, can’t do l1. Elevator slow, but drive is smooth and efficient, make good paths.
Decent cycling, not enough time to climb. Spitter end effector.
L4 is really inconsistent. They miss a lot. Able to score from front and back of robot. Easy climb

Very solid dual algae coral bot, algae seemed a lot more consistent 

Got coral stuck in bot
defensecomments: Coral stuck, got penalty in first few seconds of defense, decided to defend processor

generalcomments: can’t tell if these are intentional L- or missed L2–nvm definitely L1 but it isn’t really a robot designed to do L1 started playing D
defensecomments: kind of good at defense i mean they are avoiding penalties but at the same time they aren’t doing too much

generalcomments: Good driver and fast climb. Not sure why they missed so many L2s, may be an alignment/arm angle issue
Very impressive cycling, versatile intake. A very strong robot in this match.
Very very very very very fast cycles at all levels. Only misses were at end of match when they were rushing.
pretty good algae actions (barge and processor) but no align for coral, kind of sketch (very)

Beached rhemself in first 30!seconds 

It feels like their l2 and l3 are most consistent than l4

I’m p sure they forgot to add the score command to their auto one time as they moved to the reef but didn’t score. Got Krypton unbeached pretty easily. Other than that fine scoring/driving, nothing special
high reef intake is bad, they popped an alga. now they are stealing from the other side. were unable to climb
Pretty good deep climb, fast cycling. A very good robot from what I see.
Mid coral cycles, something happened and they went to play defense
defensecomments: Just normal blocking source didn’t get any penalties

generalcomments: Cool auton, iffy end effector seems to require too much precision. Fast climb.
Drove painfully slowly the whole time. Also had some problems with feeding.
Algae is really good. Coral scoring is very mid.
meh
they score coral pretty well, didn’t really do anything else

Honestly a pretty good ground intake, though scoring can be a little shaky sometimes it can intake from anywhere

Auto just stopped before scoring first piece, not sure what happened
Very fast cycling quite impressive. Mainly all, nothing else happened. Dedicated endgame to scoring
Solid L4 and L3 L2 missed ablot
Generally good cycles, sometimes aligned to poles that were already filled. Scored L3 and L2 mostly and didn’t miss.

auto 1 piece, could’ve definitely done more
didn’t coordinate well w teammates (a little messy on the field) and drives a bit slow (but smooth)
scoring algae and coral is consistent
defended from hp by 9416, otherwise okay driving with sharp movements
strong algae bot with okay coral, good driving and good auto

coral alignment is questionable, L4 is often missed 
def more of algae bot, efficient at net and removing algae 
driving is smooth and pretty fast

Slow cycles, got slowed down even more with defense at coral station. Their align misses a lot as they’re often not aligned to the pole when they eject the coral onto it. 
Fast and accurate deep climb.
very slow auto align and heavily defended, scoring action itself was okay

Good coral cycles, although they struggle to load a piece sometimes. Can remove algae from the reef and score in processor. 
Failed to deep climb.

fast driving + pretty fast elevator
def a coral bot but does have trouble w L4 at times
efficient paths and fast cycles
okay algae bot, okay coral bot 1 can play both but their auto align is very shaky and slow

Good coral cycles, accurate and decently fast. They can remove algae from the reef pretty easily as well. 
Fast climb during endgame.
lots of misses in auto and teleop - bad tuning?
smooth driving, net  is not trustworthy (misses a lot), crazy coral and cycle, gets a little tipsy at net, auto is a mix between l4 and l3 (didn’t finish placing jt)

Decent coral cycles, struggled to load a couple pieces of coral at the station. 
Can take algae off reef but didn’t score them anywhere.
smooth driving, elevator is a little tipsy, algae is weird placed it next to cages, cycle time is pretty fast but not the best, could be better maneuvering

7 second climb. Driving and scoring could use some improvement but the robot is overall pretty fast. It seems like they wanted control of the algae off the reef but it slipped out both times. Could be a really good bot if they get those kinks worked out.
Very good coral cycles, fast and accurate. Had a little alignment issues at the start but fixed it quickly.
really nice net cycling this match, good decision making
good coral cycling, elevator is a little jerky and so is the driving
very fast elevator, smooth driving and fast cycles, elevator gets a little flimsy

good algae removal and scoring into nets. Slow coral scoring and missed both l2 attempts. 
Managed to climb at the last second.
10s climb. good driving but their intake had a lot of trouble next to algae. Has issues controlling algae once off the reef. Less alignment/missing score problems than yesterday.
smooth driving , alignment is delayed, climb is really fast
stole algae from other side, strong algae cycling

Good scoring, missed a few L4 and L3 because they couldn’t align. Decently fast cycles without any defense. 
Fast and accurate climb.

issues controlling algae off the reef. overall pretty smooth driving, risk of CoG problems but only saw tipping in auto. One or two missed intakes - theirs is a bit small. Defense would probably work on them.
manual aligned the entire match, auto align broken so iffy scoring
okay cycles but L4 height was somewhat off at the start, complete misses
smooth driving, Fast cycles and good algae use other than net, scoring is fast

Decent coral scoring, missed all their pieces during auto because of align issues.
Failed to climb at the end because they didn’t have enough time.
Processor auto failed. Mainly focusing on algae cycles into the processor. Then focusing on coral scoring. Lots of robots in hp station where 10157 plays defense against them.
overall decent cycles but coral scoring can be kinda inaccurate
Pretty good coral scoring but sometimes they have issues w aligning and the scoring position, it seems. I can’t see an algae mech on the robot but it seems like it can sometimes remove algae.
Smooth driving & elevator scoring, just slow cycling. Very consistent algae barge and processor, better than their coral.
not very fast but very consistent coral cycles + can remove algae
2 piece auto one failed. Intakes from hp and goes to fill the reef. Had to push daisy because they got under algae. Scored a lv4 at the end and parked.
Missed a lot due to coral bouncing in scoring mech. Had to wait in hp station a lot cuz 2 teams cycling at same station
Great coral scorer, elevator is super smooth and stable, maybe just take a little long to eject the coral. Started going to climb with about 30s left. Didnt see them do algae
cycling well and the ground intake is slick. barge isn’t bad either
a little slow and also quite shaky but coral/algae scoring is pretty consistent
Didn’t score at all during tele, I have no idea what they were doing. Then they went to play some subpar defense. Super fast climb though
defensecomments: They didn’t really do much, they were occasionally a nuisance but most of the time kind of just aimlessly drove around

generalcomments: Hit their 3 piece auto. Good cycles with both algae and coral; imitating our style a bit. Alliance partner 2458 playing defense while 1712 doesn’t score as much as they do. Deep climb at the end.
good and consistent coral scoring, kept getting defended on at hp station and was slowed down as a result
consistent and fast scoring! very good
Great accurate and efficient coral scoring, not much else to say, quick cycles and can do all levels accurately
Intake takes long time, miss due to scoring alignment issues. Fast climb. Indecisive driving. Can’t do algae.
Good cycles with both algae and coral. Takes a while to align but decent over wise. Almost got stuck on an algae once. Parks at the end.
Pretty decent scoring robot, they can do both algae and coral, not super fast but not super slow. Also their climb is pretty fast
good alignment/orbiting algorithm
Hit their 3 piece auto. Missed first lv4 coral. Intakes from hp station and completes decent cycle times. Also scores algae in processor. Parks at the end.
pretty consistent scoring, robot itself looked a little unstable though

Hit 2 piece auto, but missed the last one because of time. Can score lv4 coral and remove algae which is beneficial to us. Takes a while to align sometimes but smooth driving and can fight against defense. Works well with other offensive robots. D Climb
decent robot, can do algae and coral both pretty well, just seems unsure what to do at times/dawdles around and is choppy. Decent climb as well
pretty fast cycles but alinement is a little slow and shaky
Algae auto. Fast driving and able to get to algae quickly.
Super duper fast- continuously and consistently scored just corals. Deep climbed fast.
Cannot intake algae, can only remove. Decent L3 and L2 cycles, but driving was a little bit lost at times.

Not a great bot. They have okay driving skills; their main problem is they don’t have align, so it takes more time to score. In the middle, they got stuck in an algae for 15 seconds. The other teams spent that 15 seconds to try and get them off the algae.
A solid coral bot. Consistently cycled L4 and was able to work with teammates well. Although they didn’t do it, I’m assuming they can do L3 and L2 as well.
Very inconsistent cycle times, some were very fast and well driven, and others struggled from intaking to aligning to dealing with defense.
Solid 3 piece auto and good driving, but L4 accuracy is not great. Decent cycles otherwise
Super face all around oriented robot. They had the FASTEST deep climb i've seen- Just finished scoring net with 5 seconds left, and before I knew it they were levitating.
auto starts processor red. they kinda missed a bunch of L4 and their automation for scoring is kinda slow but they are driven well.
Inconsistent and slow sometimes- one time took 20s to score 1 L4 after arriving at the reef. Took at least 15s to climb- I thought they were going to fail
not sure why they shot an L4 onto one they already had scored but otherwise driving is good and scoring is pretty consistent

SLOW CYCLES AND RUINED OUR CLIMB
HORRIBLE MATCH 
stole one algae from other alliance
defensecomments: Played defense for the last 25 seconds, but rammed into us, ruining our climb

generalcomments: auto starts far side red. they keep missing its genuinely so useless. they drive okay but are so inaccurate at the reef even after taking 5 seconds to align.
A solid algae bot. Had a pretty good algae auto, scored one algae for coopertition, and then removed all the algae that was put in their barge by the other team.
Fast and efficient at the last minute, but a bit slow and clumsy the first half. Did well overall.

auto starts processor side blue. their automation is crazy its so good. their elevator is fast, and it takes less than 2 seconds to go from trying to align to the reef to scoring the L4. theyre also very well driven, but they wont fall to us

Cycled really well, and consistent too
Took awhile on the climb (probably thought the climb would secure the win, but if they scored another coral they would still have time).
A pretty good bot overall. They primarily cycled coral, which they did with 100% accuracy. Although they didn’t use it much this game, they also have a pretty good net scoring.
Really fast at what they do- coral. Smooth with almost no errors
Scoring very consistent

Good, consistent algae cycles
Stole algae from opposing alliance
Although they seem pretty good on paper, I believe that they were pretty shaky and a little slow. They were all over the place and scored whatever they wanted to; there was no method to the madness.

auto starts far side red. hit e stop after one piece to let daisy do lollipop auto. they were good for the first 20 seconds but then started tweaking and then got back to normal. elevator seemed a bit slower than usual.
Fast, but sometimes clumsy with bumping into other robots or dropping things
auto starts processor red. faster 4 piece than us. theyre so fast and elegant nothinf more to say. great robot, a little tippy.
An okay bot. Their driving and speed aren’t bad; but their elevator is a little slow. They seem like a solid teammate.
slower cycles but accurate, the HP missed multiple times when feeding them
